reforms.description: A new Framework for Research and Development (Law 3653/2008) aims to improve governance and facilitate investment in R&D and innovation, alongside increasing R&D spending.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to enhance R&D investment and governance, leading to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in R&D governance and funding.
reforms.source_quote: Improve support to research and development (R&D) innovation programmes. Increase further R&D spending.

reforms.description: The Greek government adopted a support package aimed at enhancing the availability of credit from the banking sector, which includes increasing the deposit guarantee and providing aid measures totaling EUR28 billion to bolster bank capital and support liquidity, alongside the establishment of the 'Entrepreneurship Observatory' and a network of entrepreneurship clusters to provide advisory support for young entrepreneurs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The measures are designed to improve access to finance and support for startups, which can stimulate economic growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The support measures have been enacted and are currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The comprehensive nature of the support package represents a major reform in the startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: The establishment of the 'Entrepreneurship Observatory' and a network of entrepreneurship clusters, providing advisory support on business start-up and operation for young entrepreneurs.

reforms.description: The establishment of targeted initiatives subsidising enterprises for hiring unemployed young persons aims to enhance the transition from school to working life and increase investment in human capital.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the hiring of young individuals, the initiative aims to build a skilled workforce that can contribute to innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiatives have been put into practice and are operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative is significant but does not represent a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Establishment of targeted initiatives subsidising enterprises for hiring unemployed young persons, along with the provision of additional incentives.

reforms.description: The Greek government is preparing draft legislation to establish a system of referring physicians with free choice of personal doctor, aiming to create a network of public and private primary care providers for better coordination.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact on growth is uncertain as the reform focuses on healthcare coordination rather than direct innovation support.
reforms.status_evidence: Draft legislation is in preparation but not yet enacted.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in the healthcare system.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities are preparing a draft legislation to establish a system of referring physicians with free choice of personal doctor.
